RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0002 Page 2 of 4 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 07/04/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 470 - 2,356 09/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 2,356 11/09/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 709 3,065 21/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 726 3,791 14/12/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,265 5,056 08/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 5,056 26/07/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 2,378 7,434 14/09/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 7,434 04/03/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 81 - 7,353 21/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 232 2,008 9,129 03/04/2025 UTILITY BILL 572 1,798 10,355 23/07/2025 UTILITY BILL - 658 11,013 04/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 378 - 10,635 25/02/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 575 - 10,060 25/01/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 649 10,709 26/07/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 217 10,926 25/03/2025 UTILITY BILL 189 - 10,737 05/10/2025 UTILITY BILL - 987 11,724
